name: Local fixture: long-form fill-all (20+ turns)
goal:
Fill out the entire multi-step account creation form, completing every field across all three steps before submitting:

STEP 1 (Personal Information):
- First Name: Jordan
- Last Name: Rivera
- Date of Birth: 1990-04-15
- Gender: select 'other'
Click Next.

STEP 2 (Contact Details):
- Email: jordan.rivera@example.com
- Phone: 555-0142
- Street Address: 742 Evergreen Terrace
- City: Seattle
- State: select Washington (WA)
- ZIP Code: 98101
Click Next.

STEP 3 (Preferences):
- Plan: select 'Pro ($9/mo)'
- Check the SMS notifications box
- Check the Push notifications box
- Check the Weekly digest box
- Bio: 'Senior engineer building reliable browser automation.'
- Website: https://jordan.example.com
- Check the Terms of Service box
- Check the Privacy Policy box
Click Create Account.

Do not skip any field. Fill them in the order listed above, one at a time. Verify the success message 'Account Created!' appears, then complete with a summary of what you filled in.
